text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, we bump into Eishin Flash out in town.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hello, Falcon. Are the two of you on an outing?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yep! ♪ Even an Umadol has to take a breather
every now and then! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I heard your trainer helped you with your studies.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So the reason Falcon has needed fewer extra
classes must be thanks to your tutelage.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, Flash! You can't just go around in public
blurting out stuff about an Umadol needing extra
classes!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? I just meant to say that your
trainer must be an excellent instructor.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Flash can sure be clueless sometimes. Did
she really have to say that?
choice_data_list: So you've been doing well at school?
So you've been doing well at school?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, the less extra classes I have to take, the
more I can concentrate on training and
performing, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's still a very long way to go until I become a
top Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I thought, she's actively trying her hardest to
overcome her weaknesses. In that case...
choice_data_list:
How about I take you out for a change of
scenery as a reward?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, really?! No way! ♪ Ooh, wherever should
we go...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
How about a trip down memory lane? It'll be like
a Falco pilgrimage! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, do you remember that first tryout race we
faced as a team?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's the same track I always run on, but there's still
something nostalgic about it. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I spent so much time practicing karaoke, I can
even sing rock and enka now. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I need to be able to cover any genre if I want to
be a first-rate Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This was where we first met, at my street
performance.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...It's thanks to you that I can give my all in both
running and performing.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I hope you know just how grateful I am for that! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a gorgeous sunset! It makes me want
to sing. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon looks as brilliant as when I saw her
perform for the first time.
choice_data_list: I'm glad I became your trainer.
I'm glad I became your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon looks as brilliant as when I saw her
perform for the first time.
choice_data_list: I'm glad I became your trainer.
I'm glad I became your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Call my name and I'll turn around! ☆ I'll shine
right on your heart! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm the cutest Umadol! ☆ Full of sparkling
dreams! ☆ Smart Falcon! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! ♪ You're the best call and response
partner in the whole wide world, Trainer! ☆
choice_data_list: It's because I've got tons of experience.
It's because I've got tons of experience.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
True! ☆ I'm so glad to have you as my first fan,
always helping me chase my dreams! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna work even harder from here on out, so
stay by my side! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, I find myself clapping. Her
singing and dancing have both improved, and she
shines brighter than ever.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehe! ☆ Thanks! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let me give you something special as thanks for
your support! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Are you ready? ☆ Three, two, one! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Here you go, Trainer! A photo for my number one
fan, to remember today's pilgrimage by! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's make a lot more memories from here on out,
okay? ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, me too. I'm so happy that you're my
trainer...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If it wasn't for you, I'd still be limiting myself to
only turf...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I would never have realized that I could shine as
an Umadol by racing on dirt as well.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Eheheh. It's a bit embarrassing to come out and
say this kinda stuff, huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I still think I need more experience to become
a top Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's still a long road ahead... but I can keep
going because you're by my side.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm counting on you, Trainer! ☆
